SEARCH
Module runtime
Package runtime

Interface CommandRunner.KVArgs

Enclosing interface:
CommandRunner
public static interface CommandRunner.KVArgs
Interface CommandRunner.KVArgs provides access to typed key-value arguments converted from bare String[] args command line arguments.

Examples: 

 x = 100          // named parameter "x" with value 100
 y = 3.14         // named parameter "y" with value 3.14
 z = true         // named parameter "z" with value true
 list = [a,b,c]   // named parameter "list" with String value ["a", "b", "c"]
 list = [1,2,3]   // named parameter "list" with int value [1, 2, 3]
 drop, --no-drop  // examples of named parameters without values (key-only)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    asBoolean(String key, Boolean... altValue)
    Return value associated with the key as a boolean.
    double
    asDouble(String key, Double... altValue)
    Return value associated with the key as a double.
    int
    asInt(String key, Integer... altValue)
    Return value associated with the key as an integer.
    List<Integer>
    asIntList(String key)
    Return value associated with the key as a list of integers or an empty list [].
    List<String>
    asList(String key)
    Return value associated with the key as a list of strings or an empty list [].
    boolean
    hasKey(String key)
    Return if the given key is present.
    String
    value(String key, String... altValue)
    Return value associated with the key as a string.

  • Method Details

    • value

      String value(String key, String... altValue)
      Return value associated with the key as a string. If no value is present, return the optional alternative value or null.
      Parameters:
      key - named parameter key to look up.
      altValue - optional alternative value if no value is present.
      Returns:
      the value associated with the key or the alternative value.

    • asInt

      int asInt(String key, Integer... altValue)
      Return value associated with the key as an integer. If no value is present, return the optional alternative value or 0.
      Parameters:
      key - named parameter key to look up.
      altValue - optional alternative value if no value is present.
      Returns:
      the value associated with the key or the alternative value.

    • asDouble

      double asDouble(String key, Double... altValue)
      Return value associated with the key as a double. If no value is present, return the optional alternative value or 0.0.
      Parameters:
      key - named parameter key to look up.
      altValue - optional alternative value if no value is present.
      Returns:
      the value associated with the key or the alternative value.

    • asBoolean

      boolean asBoolean(String key, Boolean... altValue)
      Return value associated with the key as a boolean. If no value is present, return the optional alternative value or false.
      Parameters:
      key - named parameter key to look up.
      altValue - optional alternative value if no value is present.
      Returns:
      the value associated with the key or the alternative value.

    • asList

      List<String> asList(String key)
      Return value associated with the key as a list of strings or an empty list [].
      Parameters:
      key - named parameter key to look up.
      Returns:
      the value associated with the key or the alternative value.

    • asIntList

      List<Integer> asIntList(String key)
      Return value associated with the key as a list of integers or an empty list [].
      Parameters:
      key - named parameter key to look up.
      Returns:
      the value associated with the key or the alternative value.

    • hasKey

      boolean hasKey(String key)
      Return if the given key is present.
      Parameters:
      key - named parameter key to look up.
      Returns:
      true if the key is present, false otherwise.
